input.headline: Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 review – hallucinogenic romp through dystopia is stupidly pleasurable

raw.headline: Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 review – hallucinogenic romp through dystopia is stupidly pleasurable

winner: My therapist said playing *Call of Duty* was making me dissociate, so I installed a new update called "Black Ops 7." Now my hallucinations are so pleasurable, they come with achievements.

candidates.text: My therapist said playing *Call of Duty* was making me dissociate, so I installed a new update called "Black Ops 7." Now my hallucinations are so pleasurable, they come with achievements.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on therapist advice, ties in game-specific elements (achievements), concise and specific with natural humor."}

candidates.text: Why did the soldier bring a therapist to *Call of Duty*? Because even in this dystopian nightmare, he needed someone to help him process all the "stupidly pleasurable" hallucinations!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.2, "reason": "Puns on 'stupidly pleasurable' and 'hallucinations' are clever and specific to the headline. The joke is concise, surprising, and ties well to the game's context."}

candidates.text: Why did the soldier in *Call of Duty: Black Ops 7* bring a ladder to battle? Because he heard the enemy was on a *high* mission.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, uses wordplay with 'high mission' (double meaning), and ties into the game's dystopian theme. However, it lacks deeper specificity to the game's content and could be more surprising."}

candidates.text: I played *Call of Duty: Black Ops 7* and all I can say is that if you enjoy being shot at by robots while your brain temporarily forgets you own one, it’s… adequate.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat specific and has a mild surprise element with the 'brain temporarily forgets you own one' line, but it feels a bit forced and lacks the punchiness needed for maximum humor."}

candidates.text: I reviewed *Call of Duty: Black Ops 7* and found it completely boring—just a linear, predictable march through a bland future where I shoot things until they stop moving.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 2.0, "reason": "The joke contradicts the headline and lacks surprise or humor. It's generic and fails to align with the described tone of the review."}
